data.title: webAI appoints Dr. Paul J. Maykish as Chief Intelligence Officer, launches webAI Intelligence Lab in Austin on Jan 19, 2026.
data.description: In a step towards realizing its goal of creating accessible and secure intelligence for practical use, webAI has established a new laboratory. The organization, headquartered in Austin, Texas, revealed this development on January 19, 2026. Dr. Paul J. Maykish has been named as the Chief Intelligence Officer of webAI. The launch of this lab represents webAI's commitment to enhancing its capabilities in developing advanced technologies.

data.title: Injective community votes to cut INJ token supply, passing with 99.89% approval. New parameters will reduce circulating tokens.
data.description: With an overwhelming approval rate of 99.89%, the proposal has been passed to revise the issuance and buyback parameters that determine the systematic removal of INJ from circulation.

data.title: Bitcoin remains steady at near $93,000, while Ethereum is at $3,219.04, XRP at $2.01, Dogecoin at $0.1297; 246,661 traders liquidated for $852.08 million in 24 hours. United States tariff concerns impact cryptocurrency market.
data.description: Despite a 3% drop in a single day due to renewed U.S. tariff threats impacting risk assets, Bitcoin remains stable above the $92,000 level. Current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $93,068.96, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $3,219.04, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $134.50, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $2.01, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.1297, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.0 5 8070. According to Coinglass data, 246,661 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $852.08 million. SoSoValue data reveals net outflows of $394.7 million from... Details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bermuda teams up with Coinbase and Circle for completely on-chain economy, after passing a crypto-friendly regulation in 2018.
data.description: Bermuda's government has furthered its efforts to attract cryptocurrency companies by forming a new partnership. This collaboration comes after the government implemented a regulatory framework in 2018. This move aims to enhance Bermuda’s appeal to the crypto industry and foster growth in the sector.

data.title: Bitcoin at $90,000 faces warnings of crash from critic Peter Schiff as analysts predict uncertain future.
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is currently maintaining levels above $90,000 after a rebound over the weekend. Analysts are divided on the future direction, with one experienced critic predicting a significant decline while another highlighting a crucial zone that may determine BTC's trajectory. In a recent commentary, long-standing Bitcoin skeptic Peter Schiff remarked on BTC's inability to match the performance of gold, casting doubt on its "digital gold" status. Schiff noted that markets have had sufficient opportunity to integrate a bullish breakout into the pricing, and the ongoing lag in performance amplifies the uncertainty surrounding Bitcoin. For more details, read the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FRC's Tony Perkins to attend Fifth Circuit oral arguments in Louisiana Ten Commandments case on Jan. 20.
data.description: Tomorrow, January 20, 2026, Tony Perkins, the President of the Family Research Council (FRC) and a former Louisiana Legislature member, will be present for an oral argument at the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit in the case of Roake v. Brumley. This hearing is part of the en banc review process.

data.title: Steak ‘n Shake increases Bitcoin exposure to $10 million, after crediting crypto for sales boost.
data.description: Steak ‘n Shake, a popular restaurant chain, is increasing its focus on Bitcoin after attributing the cryptocurrency to boosting sales in the past year. The company has decided to put more emphasis on Bitcoin due to its impact on driving a significant increase in revenue.

data.title: Dow futures drop as Trump threatens tariffs on 8 NATO nations over Greenland - US markets closed for MLK Jr. day.
data.description: Futures in the market experienced a decline after President Trump mentioned that eight European NATO nations could face tariffs unless the U.S. acquires Greenland. The U.S. markets will be closed on Monday in observance of the MLK Jr. holiday. The push for Greenland is linked to Trump's dissatisfaction over not receiving a Nobel Prize. Dow Jones Futures recorded a fall as a result of these developments.

data.title: UpdatePromise and Dealer Tire have partnered to enhance tire sales experience for dealerships, aiming to boost revenue and profits. This collaboration integrates real-time tire data, OEM incentives, and live inventory visibility into service workflow for an improved customer experience.
data.description: Tire sales pose a significant potential for boosting revenue and profits within dealership fixed operations. A partnership between UpdatePromise and Dealer Tire aims to leverage this opportunity by integrating real-time tire data, original equipment manufacturer (OEM) incentives, and live inventory updates into the service workflow. This collaboration is expected to enhance efficiency and maximize sales within the dealership.

data.title: Suzanne Dana recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for contributions to Williamsburg Real Estate.
data.description: In Williamsburg, Virginia on January 19, 2026, Suzanne Dana was acknowledged as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle, earning the title of Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her significant impact on Residential Real Estate in the Williamsburg and Tidewater Area. Dana, with over two decades of experience, stands out for her exceptional contributions.
